# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vnet
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - '10.0.0.0/16'
      subnets:
        - name: webSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '10.0.1.0/24'
        - name: appSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '10.0.2.0/24'
        - name: databaseSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '10.0.3.0/24'

  - name: webSubnetConfig
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    parent:
      name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", "vnet")]'
    properties:
      privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled

  - name: appSubnetConfig
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    parent:
      name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", "vnet")]'
    properties:
      privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled

  - name: databaseSubnetConfig
    type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    parent:
      name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", "vnet")]'
    properties:
      privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled

  - name: ddosProtectionPlan
    type: Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    location: 'West US'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", "vnet")]'
    properties:
      sku: Standard

  - name: networkWatcher
    type: Microsoft.Insights/networkWatchers
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    location: 'West US'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", "vnet")]'
